title: RapidMeta Oncology | Elacestrant in ESR1-Mutated HR+/HER2- Advanced Breast Cancer v1.0
hero_h2: Elacestrant in ESR1-Mutated HR+/HER2- Advanced Breast Cancer

pico.pop: Postmenopausal women / men with HR+/HER2- locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer with ESR1 mutation, after 1-2 prior lines of endocrine therapy in advanced setting (including a CDK4/6 inhibitor)
pico.int: Elacestrant 400 mg orally once daily (oral selective estrogen receptor degrader, SERD)
pico.comp: Investigator's choice endocrine monotherapy (fulvestrant or aromatase inhibitor)
pico.out: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival in ESR1-mutated subpopulation (primary); PFS in ITT (co-primary); overall survival
pico.subgroup: ESR1-mutation status, prior CDK4/6i duration (>=12 vs <12 mo), visceral disease, prior fulvestrant

real_data_entries.name: EMERALD
real_data_entries.group: HR+/HER2- post-CDK4/6i mBC, elacestrant 400 mg PO QD vs investigator's choice endocrine (PFS primary in ITT + ESR1-mut subgroup)

allOutcomes.title: Investigator-assessed PFS in ITT (primary; HR vs IC endocrine)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Bidard FC et al. J Clin Oncol 2022;40:3246-3256 (EMERALD).
